name: watch
invariants: output.ok === true || typeof output.reason === 'string' || typeof output.error === 'string'
_note: Open a read-only spectator session on a world. Delegates to spectator.startSession: persists a spectator_sessions row + returns a unique session token and a WS hint. Anonymous watching is allowed (viewer_user_id stays null); a missing worldId yields reason:missing_worldId.
